item.title: Building a Local RAG Pipeline with Ollama
item.description: Step-by-step walkthrough of a retrieval-augmented generation pipeline using only local models.

item.title: DuckDB 1.2 Released
item.description: Release notes for DuckDB 1.2 covering new SQL features and performance improvements.

item.title: Pydantic v2 Migration Guide
item.description: How to migrate your Python models from Pydantic v1 to v2 with minimal changes.

item.title: Best Hiking Trails in Patagonia
item.description: A travel guide to the most scenic hiking routes in the Patagonia region.

item.title: Introduction to Vector Databases for RAG
item.description: Overview of vector database options like Chroma, Pinecone, and pgvector for RAG applications.

item.title: Top 10 Pasta Recipes of 2026
item.description: Our editors pick the best pasta dishes of the year from Italian kitchens around the world.
